goal: Refresh the M6/v0-RC sign-off state against current evidence and add a machine-readable evidence verifier so stale FE/Docker blockers cannot mask the actual remaining blocker. Record that FE v6, Docker dependency packaging, adapter structural/lineage validation, and adapter-load guard evidence are now present, while M6-RC remains NOT_GO because real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint transcripts are still missing.
head: 8b44eeb
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or test behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC GO before real trained adapter endpoint evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate is evidence/sign-off alignment only. It may add a verifier script and generated review artifact, and update M6 review docs and WORKING.md.
required_evidence: M6 FE review updated from stale NO_GO to current GO with fe_v6_evidence.md
M6 signoff/CTO decision updated so NOT_GO is caused by real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence only
Explicit note that this does not change product code or M6-RC status
warnings: This gate does not provide a real trained adapter.
This gate does not run no-fake Docker endpoint transcripts.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped evidence/sign-off refresh contract for M6 RC.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, M6 signoff matrix, CTO decision, FE review, FE v6 evidence, Docker/runtime/adapter evidence, and SSOT M6 criteria. Found stale FE blocker in review docs after FE v6 evidence was committed.
phase_notes.build: Add verifier script, generate current evidence JSON, and update M6 review docs/handoff without changing product code.
phase_notes.check: Contract JSON validation, verifier syntax check, M6 RC evidence verifier, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: M6 review docs and WORKING.md are refreshed against current evidence. artifacts/review/m6_rc_evidence_verification.json records decision NOT_GO, verification_ok true, unexpected_blockers empty, and the sole acceptable blocker real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint.

pabcd.approved_scope: M6 sign-off evidence refresh, verifier artifact, docs/WORKING.md handoff, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
